PM-Estimator combined seat = she's the trade-pick decision-maker, not just a number-cruncher.
Tractus does commercial / retail / restaurant / institutional fit-ups — fast-turn schedules where Ashrah's '5:30 PM daily reports' & 6-day delay forecasting solve a real Lisa pain.
Located at 835 King Edward — Ahmad's local advantage, easy in-person drop-by.
